The Settings root screen with its twelve categories plus Manage Subscriptions and Restore Purchases.
The Users category, new in Cachly 8, showing the Primary User account used for searching.
General settings covering measurement units, rotation lock, TB scanner, power mode and coordinate format.
Map Options & Navigation settings such as cache radius, map rotation and tilt locks, and Fit to Map.
Caches & Waypoints settings for pin design, favorite points on pins, live-search data and clustering.
Proximity Alert settings with per-context enable toggles, trigger distance and centering options.
